## Problem statement

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Who experiences it? Avoid jumping to a solution here. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Other ways to solve the problem you thought about and rejected, with reasons. -->

## Which module(s) does this affect?

- [ ] REPUTATION
- [ ] MEMORY
- [ ] OBSERVABILITY
- [ ] NEGOTIATION
- [ ] INSURANCE
- [ ] `agent-identity` (support service)
- [ ] SDKs (TS / Python)
- [ ] MCP server / framework plugins
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Cross-cutting / new module

## Roadmap fit

Does this fit the current [ROADMAP](../../docs/ROADMAP.md) or is it new ground?

- [ ] Listed in roadmap (which step?): \***\*\_\_\*\***
- [ ] Adjacent / extension to roadmap
- [ ] New territory — needs discussion

## Have you opened a Discussion first?

For new features, we strongly prefer that you open a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/Obi49/Colber/discussions) under "Ideas" before filing an issue, so the design can be socialized.

- [ ] Yes (link the Discussion): \***\*\_\_\*\***
- [ ] No, but the scope is small enough that I'm filing here directly.
